data.title: Cloud-Native Architecture
data.description: Adobe's architecture leverages cloud-native technologies for scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, and Azure services.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe employs a microservices approach to enhance modularity and development speed.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Uses event processing for real-time analytics and workflow automation.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA) Framework
data.description: Frontend is highly fluid and efficient using SPAs for user interactivity.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Ensures rapid delivery of Adobe's content across the globe.
